playbook.intent: Agent ran 40 turns and lost the plot → reconstruct trajectory, find bad transition, ship a guardrail.
playbook.scope: An agent ran 40 turns and lost the plot. Reconstruct the trajectory, find the bad state transition, ship a guardrail. Intended for one focused debug session per incident.

success-criteria.criterion: Cause categorized: context bleed / tool error / planner divergence

stage.name: Replay
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when local run reproduces the failure.

stage.name: Inspect
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when a single bad transition is named.

stage.name: Categorize
stage.intent: Layer attribution: planner / executor / memory / tool.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when category is decided.

stage.name: Guardrail
stage.decision-gate: Close session only after PR is merged.

extra.value: [Full incident postmortem — see blameless playbook, Cost optimization — see daily watch]
[Full trace of the failing run, Local replay environment]
[Treating eval scores as ground truth without judge calibration, Shipping prompt or model changes without a regression gate]
['Can I roll back this change in one step?', 'Is the regression eval committed BEFORE the fix?']

{human: faion get-content agent-state-debug-cursor-replay-session --format md, agent: faion get-content agent-state-debug-cursor-replay-session --format context, json: faion get-content agent-state-debug-cursor-replay-session --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P7 llm-agent-developer persona}]
